programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two different men report the murder of a single mother and when the case's other anomalies stall the police, a candy wrapper and seeds help expose the killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Connecticut man's body is found in a burning rental car on a Mexican highway, an insurance company suspects a scam.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, killing a young man and seriously injuring his mother, detectives hope that the remnants of a mailing label will lead them to a killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A quiet residential community, shattered by the murder of a neighbor. See how modern techniques helped investigators catch the culprit in less than 12 hours.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his Michigan auto-salvage shop.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man is murdered in a drive-by shooting. When a mobile phone trace incriminates a killer, it's up to a forensic geologist to find evidence that he was at the scene.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead, her boyfriend confesses to her murder. However, in a strange twist, so does another man; police must determine which is the killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher gives his friend a ride home but never returns; his wife and friend receive letters saying he started a new life, but they suspect foul play despite no body being discovered.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed in her own home by her mother and father. Her parents said they acted in self-defense, but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators determine if a computer crash which almost ruined a manufacturing company was accidental or deliberate sabotage.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Car with three Secret Service agents collides with local deputy's car; investigation launched into who was responsible for the deadly car accident finds two very different conclusions.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The derailment of the Sunset Limited was the deadliest train crash in U.S. history killing 47 passengers and crew with several more injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Arson investigators attempt to determine the cause of the 1987 fire at the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A canine behaviorist uses the family dogs, who are the only witnesses, to find the murderer of their owner.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators see through a killer trying to cover his tracks by staging the crime scene to learn what really happened.

programme.title: CNN News Central (HLN)
programme.desc: The anchors share the latest stories about significant events that take place across the world and interview prominent figures.

programme.title: CNN News Central (HLN)
programme.desc: The anchors share the latest stories about significant events that take place across the world and interview prominent figures.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman heads home after church, but never makes it there alive, triggering a homicide investigation.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Volunteers and police spend weeks searching for a missing girl. A psychic later leads them to a field where the body was found.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Forensic investigators try to stop a killer who is apparently responsible for two slayings in a community in South Carolina.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When DNA proves that a man who practically admits to a brutal attack is innocent, police wonder why he is willing to take the blame.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a businessman is murdered, motives and suspects are plentiful. Was it simply a disgruntled employee or client? Or do some racy photos hold the clue to the crime?

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family break turns into a nightmare when the wife is found face-down in a lake; with no idea whether it was murder, an accident or suicide, police turn to a new forensic technique.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When friends see a woman in the back of a car flailing her arms and screaming, they assume she is having fun, but when they later come upon a jacket and a pool of blood, they realize they witnessed an abduction in progress.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An attack on a couple's home leaves the husband dead, the wife gravely injured and their son as a prime suspect; hundreds of miles away, a DNA sample may lead to the killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives think they've solved a murder when they find the weapon and victim's blood in a man's flat, but the evidence may have been planted.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives search for the bombers of two churches in Illinois, hoping that the materials used in the remnants of the handmade bombs will offer the clues to catch the culprits.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead; but when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is stabbed a hundred times and her body positioned in a suggestive manner. This could be a hate crime against women.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A couple's murder leads investigators into the world of white supremacists and a string of hate crimes.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A rare gun and a victim's beloved dog help investigators trying to solve a multi-year-long murder case where most of the witnesses were admitted drug users.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A search in Virginia's DNA databank reveals the identity of a news producer's murderer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A homicide detective claims his wife accidentally shot herself in the head, but the evidence indicates otherwise.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Officials probe the death of a woman investigating the possible side effects of the drug she was prescribed for bipolar disorder.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A chip of stainless steel brings a killer to justice 20 years after a woman's body is found in a ravine.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An 11-year-old girl is sexually assaulted and shot twice at close range.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed weeks before testifying against the man who sexually assaulted her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: New York police hunt the Zodiac killer after a series of deadly attacks.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep, toxicology tests reveal that it may have been foul play. Could a "suicide note" hold the key to solving the case?

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A child's memory, a diary and a forensic psychologist help investigators solve a young woman's murder.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators weigh several theories while probing the death of a retired police officer, including a botched robbery and suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two different men report the murder of a single mother and when the case's other anomalies stall the police, a candy wrapper and seeds help expose the killer.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A discarded sleeping bag, containing bloody sneakers and a purse, leads police to the body of a young woman; a mark found on the victim's body enables police to track the killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's apparent accidental death begins to look fishy after police uncover a letter written by the victim days before her untimely death.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An Alaskan trooper finds a woman's body beside a frozen road, but evidence is scant even after a suspected murder weapon is found.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with a woman who disappeared 20 years ago.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A news anchor is shot to death outside her home in an apparent crime of passion by a fan; a police dog tracks the scent of the killer back to the crime scene.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fire, caused by an unattended cigarette, kills the estranged wife of a police officer; forensic scientists discover that the cause is far more complicated.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A trio of men, responsible for several bank robberies, leaves no evidence behind; forensic scientists help catch them by looking at the criminals' posture and clothing.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman's bone marrow test reveals arsenic poisoning, investigators try to determine if it is due to groundwater contamination or something more sinister.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A missing bank president's body is found floating in a lake; the duct tape used in binding him to a chair helps solve the crime.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A husband was shot and killed, forensic psychiatry helped the wife to remember the details for what happened.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a 16-year-old girl is discovered nine months after her disappearance; forensic scientists find clues that paint a virtual portrait of her killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman falls to her death in what appears to be a tragic accident; a forensic exam of photos taken at the scene tells a different story.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by her mother's long-ago disappearance, a woman undertakes an investigation of her own and stumbles upon a dark family secret.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple goes unsolved for 10 years; a forensic scientist makes history when he solves the crime.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young girl beaten after watching her grandmother killed, identifies the wrong person; years later she tries to change her statement.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984 police failed to convict the murderer of a college student; new technology may finally help the police to catch her killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: The anchors share the latest stories about significant events that take place across the world and interview prominent figures.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are able to create a composite sketch of a man burnt beyond recognition. But tracking the killer is more challenging.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: By cutting a strand of a murdered man's hair into sections, forensics reveal a record of his last six months alive, and find he was frequently ingesting huge amounts of arsenic.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver, and no witnesses, an ambush or a random attack; the clue was something so tiny, it was measured in millionths of a meter.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Teenager is found half-naked with her throat slit; a single foreign hair found on her thumb may finger the killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered; the similarities of the crime scenes led police to believe they were dealing with a serial killer who hated women, and they had to find him before he struck again.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Weeks after a student vanishes, the body of an unknown female is found in the ashes of a fire 700 miles away; an alert policeman realizes the crimes could be connected.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators face a growing list of suspects after a beautiful flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The assistant manager of the restaurant had been stabbed to death; police knew why he'd been killed: $8,000 was missing from the safe. As to who was responsible, his family and friends couldn't even imagine who'd want to hurt him.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Florida authorities rely on DNA evidence to try to nail the killer of a woman who was abducted from her late-night job at a convenience store, raped and strangled.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wild fire in a secluded parking lot leads police to discover a dreadful homicide, with the suspect's image caught by security cameras.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office, investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets and an even deeper hatred for the doctor.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police don't have a basis for comparison to match shoe impressions, blood drops and DNA evidence from a murder scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man is charged with the murder of a wrestling champion; six years later, a forensic animator testifies on his behalf.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old girl is found dead in her car in what appears to be a suicide; police discover that the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people motive to kill.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fifteen years after a man disappears, using a metal detector, police find evidence which proves what had happened.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
